ddls:
CREATE TABLE "identity_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each identity provider */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization associated with the identity provider */,
  "entity_id" TEXT /* Entity ID for the identity provider */,
  "registration_authority" TEXT /* Registration authority for the identity provider */,
  "last_test_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last test performed on the identity provider */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details or notes about the identity provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the identity provider */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number for contacting the identity provider */,
  "is_compliant" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the identity provider is compliant with security standards */,
  "support_url" TEXT /* URL for support resources related to the identity provider */,
  "support_email" TEXT /* Email address for support related to the identity provider */,
  "protocol_version" TEXT /* Version of the authentication protocol used by the identity provider */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the identity provider (e.g., active, inactive, under review) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the identity provider's information was last updated */,
  "last_test_result" TEXT /* Results of the last test performed on the identity provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each identity provider
Name of the organization associated with the identity provider
Entity ID for the identity provider
Registration authority for the identity provider
Date and time of the last test performed on the identity provider
Additional details or notes about the identity provider
Email address for contacting the identity provider
Phone number for contacting the identity provider
Indicates whether the identity provider is compliant with security standards
URL for support resources related to the identity provider
Email address for support related to the identity provider
Version of the authentication protocol used by the identity provider
Current status of the identity provider (e.g., active, inactive, under review)
Date and time when the identity provider's information was last updated
Results of the last test performed on the identity provider
